calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-16-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/M. Vallejo, CSR. Debbie Neville.
Petitioner, July Winn-Bell Olsen present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition for change of name to Judy Winn-Bell.
Decree signed in open court.
